question: Chapter 16 examined data from an experimental cohort that was part of the NIHsponsored Women's Health Initiative study. This experimental cohort study involved 16,608 postmenopausal women. Roughly half these women were assigned conjugated estrogens $\left(n_1=8506\right)$. The remaining subjects ( $n_2=8102$ ) received a placebo. Coronary heart disease, invasive breast cancer, and other adverse outcomes were monitored in the groups on an ongoing basis.
